data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for pausing/canceling lifecycle and grace windows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding the pause/cancel lifecycle and grace windows. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or data related to this requirement. While there are multiple passed steps related to bookings and offers, none of them directly address the pause/cancel functionality or grace windows, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of pause/cancel lifecycle and grace windows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
